title: iris virescens var. erratica
intro: Iris virescens var. erratica, also known as the northern blue flag or wild iris, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Iris virescens var. erratica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Iris virescens var. erratica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
